name: Baker Park
description: Baker Park is a place to play pickleball in Canandaigua, NY. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Clifton Springs Village Park
description: Clifton Springs Village Park is a place to play pickleball in Clifton Springs, NY. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Clifton Springs YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Clifton Springs YMCA in Clifton Springs, NY! There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court cannot be reserved. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Farmington Town Park
description: Come play pickleball at Farmington Town Park in Farmington, NY! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Fishers Park
description: Fishers Park is a place to play pickleball in Victor, NY. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Geneva Community Center
description: Geneva Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Geneva, NY. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. Reservations are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: In A Pickle
description: In A Pickle is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Canandaigua, NY. There are 10 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons.

name: Naples Rotary Pickleball Complex
description:
New courts completed in May 2024. Excellent facility.

There are portajohns conveniently located near the pickleball courts.

name: Pinnacle Athletic Campus
description: There a 4 courts in the West Gym and 4 courts in the East Gym.
fees: Fee required — Senior Rate 65 & Over $40.00. Under 65 $50.00

name: Sands Family YMCA
description: Sands Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Canandaigua, NY. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, locker rooms, and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Sands YMCA
description: Sands YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Canandaigua, NY. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights.

name: Sonnenberg Park
description: Sonnenberg Park is a place to play pickleball in Canandaigua, NY. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Town Of Seneca Town Court
description: Town Of Seneca Town Court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Stanley, NY. There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.
